verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In choosing of a Bride, I want someone by My side, Who will cherish and obey my every Word; To believe in Me And know that I will faithful be; If you want to be one with Me Answer please.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Will you marry Me, I'll take you home with Me, I have a place prepared for you, You won't believe; The Tree of Life is there, Flowers blooming everywhere, But best of all We'll be together eternally.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Greater Love was never known That Christ would leave His own, To choose a Bride from this Gentile race; And He said, "Whosoever will, "Let him come and I will give." If you want to forever live, Answer please.
